rows.canonical_intent: Cloud production planes must be Go services: Gateway, Brain, Control, Executor/Hands, Canvas, Temporal Worker, brevioctl CLI
rows.conformance_notes: All 7 Go entry points exist under cmd/. Services dir has TS duplicates quarantined as NON_PRODUCTION.
rows.required_action: None. Maintain quarantine of TS services.

rows.canonical_intent: TypeScript permitted only for Hands skill runtime, Edge agent, and Web/demo frontend
rows.conformance_notes: Hands TS runtime exists at services/brevio-hands/. However, 9 other TS services in services/ are quarantined but not fully removed.
rows.required_action: Enforce NON_PRODUCTION quarantine in CI. Prevent accidental deployment of quarantined TS services.

rows.canonical_intent: All orchestration runs as Temporal workflows/activities using Go Temporal SDK
rows.conformance_notes: 17 Temporal workflows registered in worker.go (9 core + 8 P8). internal/workflows/ state machines classified as domain state transition helpers per D019 (not orchestration bypasses).

rows.canonical_intent: Per-plane Temporal task queues: brevio-core, brevio-gateway, brevio-brain, brevio-control, brevio-executor, brevio-canvas, brevio-admin
rows.conformance_notes: Worker registers on brevio-core queue. Per-plane queue separation not fully verified for all 7 queues.
rows.required_action: Audit worker.go to confirm all 7 task queues are registered and routed correctly.

rows.canonical_intent: Control plane issues durable signed authorization receipts for all side effects
rows.conformance_notes: Authorization receipts implemented in control/receipts.go with receipt_id, workspace_id, plan_id, tool_keys, decision, timestamps, signature. Migration 009 creates authorization_receipts table.

rows.canonical_intent: Activities must verify receipts and refuse to execute without them; deny-by-default posture
rows.conformance_notes: Semantic verifiers exist in control plane. Not all 23 activities verified to enforce receipt checking before execution.
rows.required_action: Audit all activity implementations to confirm receipt verification is enforced. Add integration test proving deny-by-default.

rows.canonical_intent: Control is the sole authorizer and commit orchestrator — no bypass paths
rows.conformance_notes: Control plane implements OPA evaluation, firewall layers, and mux routing. OPA policies enforce deny-by-default.

rows.canonical_intent: workspace_id (UUIDv7) is the universal tenant isolation key with RLS on all production tables
rows.conformance_notes: pool.go calls SET app.workspace_id on every session. RLS policies in migration 007. All DB access routed through pool.

rows.canonical_intent: Every request must resolve workspace_id or fail — no default workspace allowed
rows.conformance_notes: Pool enforces workspace_id resolution. Identity service extracts workspace from JWT claims.

rows.canonical_intent: UUIDv7 (RFC 9562) required for all new primary keys via github.com/google/uuid
rows.conformance_notes: UUIDv7 generation implemented. Reconciliation migration exists. Property tests verify RFC 9562 compliance.

rows.canonical_intent: db/migrations/ is the only production migration chain; legacy migrations/ quarantined as pre-v9
rows.conformance_notes: db/migrations/ has 13 production migrations (001-013). However, legacy migrations/ directory still contains 51 files and is not clearly quarantined in code.
rows.required_action: Add explicit quarantine marker to migrations/ directory. Ensure migration loader only reads from db/migrations/.

rows.canonical_intent: Deterministic retry jitter using FNV1a64 formula: seed=workflow_id|activity|attempt
rows.conformance_notes: Jitter implementation uses FNV1a64 with deterministic seeding. Tests verify formula matches specification.

rows.canonical_intent: TS skill corpus kept in services/hands-runtime/ with strict versioned contract
rows.conformance_notes: Hands runtime exists at services/brevio-hands/ (not services/hands-runtime/ as specified). Versioned contract endpoints (list_skills, get_schema, execute_skill, health, metrics) need verification.
rows.required_action: Verify all 5 contract endpoints are implemented. Consider renaming to match blueprint path.

rows.canonical_intent: Go Executor activities call Hands runtime only after receipt verification
rows.conformance_notes: Executor and Hands call packages exist. Receipt verification flow needs end-to-end audit.
rows.required_action: Add integration test proving executor refuses to call Hands without valid receipt.

rows.canonical_intent: All production domain state persists in PostgreSQL via pgx; in-memory repos only in test files
rows.conformance_notes: 8 pgx repositories exist. However, 82 files use sync.Mutex for in-memory state in production paths (not behind build tags or test files). This is a critical S1 violation.
rows.required_action: Migrate all 82 sync.Mutex in-memory stores to pgx-backed implementations. This is the highest-priority remediation.

rows.canonical_intent: Semantic similarity uses OpenAI embeddings (text-embedding-3-small, 1536 dims) persisted in pgvector
rows.conformance_notes: pgvector integration with IVFFlat indexes. Embedding service wraps OpenAI text-embedding-3-small.

rows.canonical_intent: Lexical Jaccard similarity forbidden in production paths — only test fallbacks
rows.conformance_notes: Algorithm fidelity tests verify no Jaccard in production paths. Embedding-based cosine distance used exclusively.

rows.canonical_intent: Structured JSON logging via internal/runtime/logger.go
rows.conformance_notes: Logger and observability packages present. Structured JSON logging configured.

rows.canonical_intent: Health checks: /health, /health/deep, /healthz/ready, /healthz/live; Metrics at /metrics
rows.conformance_notes: Gateway exposes health endpoints. Deep health and readiness probes need verification across all services.
rows.required_action: Verify all 13 cmd entry points expose the required health check endpoints.

rows.canonical_intent: Federation data model: negotiation_state lifecycle (pending/accepted/rejected/revoked) in federation_peers table
rows.conformance_notes: Federation service and Temporal workflow implemented. State machine for negotiation lifecycle present.

rows.canonical_intent: Federation permission types: memory_read, memory_write, tool_delegate, knowledge_sync, lesson_share
rows.conformance_notes: P8 feature closures: federation, edge sync, browser, fast-path, experiments, onboarding, billing, load shedding — all workflow-driven with policy gates and persistence.

rows.canonical_intent: Voice pipeline: outbound calls via VAPI (primary) with Retell (fallback)
rows.conformance_notes: Voice service with VAPI/Retell failover. Temporal workflow orchestrates session lifecycle.

rows.canonical_intent: Real-time voice uses LiveKit rooms with JWT token signing (HS256)
rows.conformance_notes: JWT signer exists. LiveKit integration in voice service needs full audit.
rows.required_action: Verify LiveKit room creation and JWT signing uses HS256 as specified.

rows.canonical_intent: Post-session task extraction via ExtractVoiceTasksActivity Temporal activity
rows.conformance_notes: Voice task extraction activity registered in Temporal worker.

rows.canonical_intent: Learning consolidation: user corrections clustered by embedding similarity into lesson candidates
rows.conformance_notes: Learning consolidation pipeline with conflict detection (redundant >60% overlap, superseded, contradictory). Temporal workflow orchestration.

rows.canonical_intent: Gateway service: message ingestion, channel routing, attachment pipeline
rows.conformance_notes: Gateway with channel clients, attachment pipeline, message envelope handling, and pgx repository.

rows.canonical_intent: Gateway document parsing and interactive reply handling
rows.conformance_notes: Document parsing and interactive reply modules implemented with tests.

rows.canonical_intent: Brain service: intent classification, confidence calibration, multi-intent decomposition
rows.conformance_notes: Brain service with confidence calibration, multi-intent detection, keyword classification, and dynamic decomposition.

rows.canonical_intent: Brain disambiguation and counterfactual reasoning
rows.conformance_notes: Disambiguation, counterfactual reasoning, and critic-reflector modules present with tests.

rows.canonical_intent: Brain partial failure handling for graceful degradation
rows.conformance_notes: Partial failure handling module with tests.

rows.canonical_intent: Control plane: OPA policy evaluation for authorization decisions
rows.conformance_notes: OPA integration in control plane. 22 policy files covering gates, enforcement, and domain constraints.

rows.canonical_intent: Control plane: financial rules enforcement and budget controls
rows.conformance_notes: Financial rules and budget enforcement OPA policy implemented.

rows.canonical_intent: Control plane: load shedding controller for backpressure management
rows.conformance_notes: Load shedding controller with tests.

rows.canonical_intent: Control plane: content firewall layers for safety enforcement
rows.conformance_notes: Firewall layers with OPA content firewall gate policy.

rows.canonical_intent: Executor service: tool execution chains with receipt verification
rows.conformance_notes: Executor has cache manager, chains, and rate coordinator. Receipt verification integration needs end-to-end verification.
rows.required_action: Add integration test verifying receipt-gated execution flow.

rows.canonical_intent: Executor: Git HTTPS ingestion and connector management
rows.conformance_notes: Git HTTPS client and ingestion pipeline with connector subsystem.

rows.canonical_intent: Executor: Home Assistant and external service integration
rows.conformance_notes: Home Assistant integration module with tests.

rows.canonical_intent: Executor: latency preemption for time-sensitive operations
rows.conformance_notes: Latency preemption module with tests.

rows.canonical_intent: Canvas service: CRDT-based collaborative editing protocol
rows.conformance_notes: Canvas service with CRDT persistence. Protocol and service modules present.

rows.canonical_intent: Memory service: episodic retrieval, decay functions, cold start, proactive surfacing
rows.conformance_notes: Memory service has pgx repository and all specified modules. However, memory/service.go uses sync.Mutex for in-memory state (S1 violation).
rows.required_action: Migrate in-memory state in memory/service.go to pgx-backed persistence.

rows.canonical_intent: Memory consolidation rules (v93) and exclusion rules
rows.conformance_notes: V93 consolidation rules, exclusion rules, and memory policies implemented with tests.

rows.canonical_intent: Cognition service: dual-process thinking (System 1/System 2), Bayesian reasoning
rows.conformance_notes: Dual process and Bayesian reasoning modules with pgx repository.

rows.canonical_intent: Cognition: case-based reasoning, graph-of-thought, theory-of-mind
rows.conformance_notes: All three modules exist but use sync.Mutex in-memory state instead of pgx persistence (S1 violation).
rows.required_action: Migrate in-memory state to pgx-backed implementations.

rows.canonical_intent: Cognition: drift detection and implicit learning
rows.conformance_notes: Drift detection, implicit learning, and consolidation modules present with tests.

rows.canonical_intent: Cognition: clarification and few-shot learning
rows.conformance_notes: Clarification and few-shot modules with tests.

rows.canonical_intent: Learning service: correction clustering, conflict detection, pgx persistence
rows.conformance_notes: Learning service with pgx repository, conflict detection, and consolidation. Repository interface properly defined.

rows.canonical_intent: RAG service: pgvector store with freshness scoring and embedding evaluation
rows.conformance_notes: Full RAG pipeline with pgvector, freshness scoring, embeddings, and evaluation framework.

rows.canonical_intent: MCP service: fleet management, runtime rollout, pgx persistence
rows.conformance_notes: MCP fleet management with pgx repository, runtime rollout module.

rows.canonical_intent: Security: JWT authentication with workspace-scoped claims
rows.conformance_notes: JWT service with signer and workspace policy enforcement.

rows.canonical_intent: Security: mTLS for inter-service communication
rows.conformance_notes: mTLS module with tests.

rows.canonical_intent: Security: encryption at rest, PII handling, sandbox isolation
rows.conformance_notes: Encryption service, PII, and sandbox directories exist. Full coverage of all data-at-rest paths needs verification.
rows.required_action: Audit all persistence paths for encryption-at-rest coverage.

rows.canonical_intent: RBAC middleware for role-based access control
rows.conformance_notes: RBAC middleware and service with tests.

rows.canonical_intent: OPA policies: 22 policy files covering gates, enforcement, domain constraints, and addendum rules
rows.conformance_notes: 22 OPA policy files covering all specified gate categories. Tests at policies/tests/ and policies/v10_gates_test.rego.

rows.canonical_intent: Guardrails service: inference-based safety checks
rows.conformance_notes: Guardrails inference and service with Helm chart for deployment.

rows.canonical_intent: Admin service: action replay, behavioral risk, cost attribution, feature adoption analytics
rows.conformance_notes: Admin service modules with handlers and analytics capabilities.

rows.canonical_intent: Onboarding service: copy templates and state machine for user onboarding flow
rows.conformance_notes: Onboarding with state machine, copy templates, and service layer.

rows.canonical_intent: Compliance: execution log scrubbing with scheduled retention enforcement
rows.conformance_notes: Full compliance pipeline with pgx store, scheduler, retention enforcement, and service layer.

rows.canonical_intent: Audit: pgx sink for immutable audit trail
rows.conformance_notes: Audit pgx sink and service with tests.

rows.canonical_intent: Billing service: workspace billing with wallet integration
rows.conformance_notes: BillingEnforcementWorkflow: webhook ingestion (idempotent), ledger updates, policy gating on subscription deletion/payment failure. Tables: billing_webhook_events, billing_ledger_entries.

rows.canonical_intent: Agent orchestration: multi-agent workflows with delegation
rows.conformance_notes: Agent entry point and delegation module exist. Agent orchestration workflow is a pure-Go state machine, not a real Temporal workflow (D2 violation).
rows.required_action: Migrate agent_orchestration_workflow.go to real Temporal workflow.

rows.canonical_intent: Browser automation service with workflow orchestration
rows.conformance_notes: BrowserAutomationWorkflow orchestrates browser sessions via Temporal with receipt enforcement. 5 session types: scrape, form_fill, booking, price_watch, screenshot. Sessions persisted to browser_sessions table.

rows.canonical_intent: Marketing service: campaign management workflows
rows.conformance_notes: Marketing service and OPA gate exist. Marketing workflow is pure-Go state machine, not Temporal (D2 violation).
rows.required_action: Migrate marketing_workflow.go to real Temporal workflow.

rows.canonical_intent: Cron service: scheduled task management
rows.conformance_notes: Cron service and OPA gate exist. Cron workflow is pure-Go state machine, not Temporal (D2 violation).
rows.required_action: Migrate cron_workflow.go to real Temporal workflow.

rows.canonical_intent: Router service: intelligent request routing
rows.conformance_notes: Router service and OPA gate exist. Routing workflow is pure-Go state machine, not Temporal (D2 violation).
rows.required_action: Migrate routing_workflow.go to real Temporal workflow.

rows.canonical_intent: Context management: compression and allocation for LLM context windows
rows.conformance_notes: Context compression and allocation exist but use sync.Mutex in-memory state (S1 violation).
rows.required_action: Migrate to pgx-backed state or verify these are stateless utilities.

rows.canonical_intent: LLM service: model routing with latency-aware selection
rows.conformance_notes: LLM service and latency router exist but use sync.Mutex in-memory state (S1 violation).
rows.required_action: Migrate in-memory routing state to pgx-backed persistence or Redis.

rows.canonical_intent: Streaming service for real-time data delivery
rows.conformance_notes: Streaming package exists. Full implementation audit needed.
rows.required_action: Verify streaming service completeness against blueprint.

rows.canonical_intent: Dead letter queue handling for failed messages
rows.conformance_notes: DLQ package exists. Integration with Temporal failure paths needs verification.
rows.required_action: Audit DLQ integration with all workflow failure paths.

rows.canonical_intent: Transactional outbox pattern for reliable event publishing
rows.conformance_notes: Outbox service uses pgx for transactional outbox pattern.

rows.canonical_intent: CRDT persistence for conflict-free replicated data types
rows.conformance_notes: CRDT persistence with pgx backing.

rows.canonical_intent: Connectors: OAuth runtime for external service integrations
rows.conformance_notes: OAuth runtime exists but uses sync.Mutex for token cache (S1 violation).
rows.required_action: Migrate OAuth token cache to pgx or Redis-backed storage.

rows.canonical_intent: Council: meta-reasoning for multi-model consensus
rows.conformance_notes: Meta-reasoning module exists but uses sync.Mutex in-memory state (S1 violation).

rows.canonical_intent: Trust scoring service for reliability assessment
rows.conformance_notes: Trust package exists. Full trust scoring pipeline needs verification.

rows.canonical_intent: Experiments/feature flags for A/B testing and gradual rollout
rows.conformance_notes: ExperimentAssignmentWorkflow with deterministic FNV-1a variant assignment. Persisted assignments (UNIQUE workspace+experiment+subject) ensure idempotent rollout.

rows.canonical_intent: Provisioning service: workspace provisioning and lifecycle management
rows.conformance_notes: Provisioning package and OPA gate exist.

rows.canonical_intent: Identity: workspace policies and workspace type rules enforcement
rows.conformance_notes: Workspace policies, type rules, and identity service with tests.

rows.canonical_intent: OpenAPI v9 specification for API contract
rows.conformance_notes: V9 OpenAPI spec exists.
rows.required_action: None — v9 is superseded by v10.

rows.canonical_intent: OpenAPI v10 specification for API contract
rows.conformance_notes: V10 OpenAPI spec exists. Contract closure tests verify service ownership alignment.

rows.canonical_intent: Production migration chain: db/migrations/001-013 covering v9 init through OpenClaw adoption
rows.conformance_notes: 13 forward-only production migrations in correct order.

rows.canonical_intent: Legacy migrations/ directory quarantined as pre-v9 schema
rows.conformance_notes: 51 legacy migrations exist in migrations/ (001-051) with up/down files. Not formally quarantined — no build tag or CI gate prevents accidental use.
rows.required_action: Add explicit quarantine marker and CI check preventing production use of migrations/ directory.

rows.canonical_intent: Helm charts for all production services
rows.conformance_notes: 18 Helm charts covering all services plus umbrella chart.

rows.canonical_intent: Terraform modules for infrastructure provisioning: EKS, RDS, S3, SQS, ElastiCache, VPC, etc.
rows.conformance_notes: 12 Terraform modules with staging and production environments.

rows.canonical_intent: Terraform environments: staging, production, DR
rows.conformance_notes: Duplicate Terraform trees exist: terraform/ and infra/terraform/. DR environment only in infra/terraform/.
rows.required_action: Consolidate to single Terraform root. Ensure DR environment is in the canonical path.

rows.canonical_intent: Internal workflows service: drift watchdog rules
rows.conformance_notes: Drift watchdog exists as pure-Go state machine. Should be Temporal workflow per D2.
rows.required_action: Evaluate whether drift watchdog should be migrated to Temporal or reclassified as non-orchestration utility.

rows.canonical_intent: V91 addendum workflows and activities for soft intelligence layer
rows.conformance_notes: V91 workflows in internal/workflows/ use go.temporal.io SDK imports but coexist with pure-Go state machine workflows. Inconsistent placement — should be in internal/temporal/.
rows.required_action: Move v91_workflows.go and v91_activities.go to internal/temporal/ for consistency.

rows.canonical_intent: Message processing and compliance workflows
rows.conformance_notes: Pure-Go state machine workflows not using Temporal SDK (D2 violation).

rows.canonical_intent: Memory workflow for memory lifecycle management
rows.conformance_notes: Pure-Go state machine workflow not using Temporal SDK (D2 violation).

rows.canonical_intent: Voice session workflow with heartbeat monitoring via Temporal
rows.conformance_notes: VoiceSessionWorkflow implemented as real Temporal workflow with heartbeat monitoring.

rows.canonical_intent: STT/TTS primary/fallback failover with 3-error circuit breaking threshold
rows.conformance_notes: Voice service exists. Circuit breaker threshold and failover logic need verification.
rows.required_action: Verify 3-error circuit breaking threshold is implemented.

rows.canonical_intent: Federation sync workflow via Temporal with RLS on both source and target workspace
rows.conformance_notes: FederationSyncWorkflow implemented as real Temporal workflow. Service layer handles negotiation states.

rows.canonical_intent: Codebase intelligence service for repository analysis
rows.conformance_notes: Codebase intel service with pgx integration.

rows.canonical_intent: Self-modification capabilities for agent self-improvement
rows.conformance_notes: Self-modification package exists. Blueprint intent is ambiguous on scope and safety boundaries.
rows.required_action: Clarify blueprint requirements for self-modification scope.

rows.canonical_intent: Edge agent service for client-side operations
rows.conformance_notes: EdgeOfflineSyncWorkflow with 4-step pipeline: fetch → conflict detect → resolve → execute. Idempotency via UNIQUE(workspace_id, idempotency_key). FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED for safe concurrency.

rows.canonical_intent: Prefetch service for proactive data loading
rows.conformance_notes: OnboardingProvisioningWorkflow with 4 staged gates (workspace_setup, policy_defaults, integration_check, first_value) and first-value verification. Sessions persisted to onboarding_sessions.

rows.canonical_intent: Fastpath service for low-latency request handling bypass
rows.conformance_notes: FastPathPipelineWorkflow with latency budget enforcement (MaximumAttempts: 1, fail-fast). Routes persisted to fast_path_routes with hit count metrics.

rows.canonical_intent: Model tiers: tiered model selection for cost/quality tradeoffs
rows.conformance_notes: Model tiers package exists. Integration with LLM router needs verification.
rows.required_action: Verify model tier configuration and LLM router integration.

rows.canonical_intent: Contract tests: blueprint coverage, acceptance gates, dependency closure, OpenAPI ownership
rows.conformance_notes: Comprehensive contract test suite covering blueprint coverage, acceptance gates, dependency closure, and OpenAPI alignment.

rows.canonical_intent: Emotional intelligence (EQ) module for sentiment-aware responses
rows.conformance_notes: EQ package exists. Blueprint coverage for emotional intelligence scope needs verification.
rows.required_action: Verify EQ module integration with brain service.

rows.canonical_intent: Determinism utilities: UUID generation and deterministic operations
rows.conformance_notes: Determinism package with UUID utilities supporting UUIDv7.

rows.canonical_intent: Caching layer for performance optimization
rows.conformance_notes: Caching package exists. Likely uses sync.Mutex in-memory state.
rows.required_action: Verify caching is backed by ElastiCache/Redis as provisioned in Terraform, not in-memory only.

rows.canonical_intent: Quarantined TS services marked NON_PRODUCTION
rows.conformance_notes: NON_PRODUCTION.md exists but 9 TS services remain in services/ directory. Only brevio-hands is permitted per D1.
rows.required_action: Add CI gate preventing deployment of quarantined TS services.

rows.canonical_intent: No in-memory persistence (sync.Mutex) in production code paths — S1 violation tracking
rows.conformance_notes: 82 files use sync.Mutex for in-memory state in production paths. This is a critical S1 violation of D9 (persistence strategy). Only 8 pgx repositories exist out of 70+ services.
rows.required_action: Systematic migration of all 82 sync.Mutex in-memory stores to pgx-backed implementations. This is the single highest-priority remediation item.
